AdmissionForm.selectNetworkError: Please indicate whether you belong to the Network.
AdmissionForm.phoneHint: The prefix updates with the country. Change it from the dropdown if you want.
AdmissionForm.section2Subtitle: Tell us about your ministry and professional context.
AdmissionForm.section3Subtitle: If you do NOT belong to our network, you must upload a letter from your pastor.
AdmissionForm.belongsToNetwork: Do you belong to the R&A Apostolic Network or to Revival & Kingdom Ministries, INC?
AdmissionForm.consentLetter: Consent letter signed by your pastor
AdmissionForm.consentLetterHint: PDF, JPG or PNG · max 10 MB

AdmissionActions.approvedAndSent: Admission approved and letter sent. You can resend the letter if the student reports they did not receive it.
AdmissionActions.approvedPending: Admission approved. The letter will be sent automatically within 24h by the cron. You can resend it now if you need to.
AdmissionActions.decisionHelp: Approving assigns an enrollment number + start date + sends the PDF letter within 24h. Rejecting sends an email to the applicant with the reason.
AdmissionActions.resendLetterDescription: The letter PDF will be generated with today's date and sent to the applicant's email. It bypasses the daily cron (no 24h wait). Idempotent — it does not duplicate the cron's automatic send.
AdmissionActions.approveDescription: A unique enrollment number and start date (the first Tuesday after today) will be assigned. The student will see their status updated immediately; the signed PDF letter will be sent to the student automatically 24 hours later.
AdmissionActions.rejectDescription: The applicant will receive an email with the selected reason. They can reapply later.
AdmissionActions.customReasonPlaceholder: Explain to the applicant the basis for the rejection.

BlockEditForm.brandNameHelp: Large gradient title shown on the cards. If you leave it empty, the academic title is used.
BlockEditForm.title: Academic title
BlockEditForm.titleHelp: E.g. "Fundamentos Espirituales". Appears below the brand_name.
BlockEditForm.subtitle: Subtitle (short phrase)
BlockEditForm.subtitlePlaceholder: A punchy phrase that sums up the block.
BlockEditForm.promisePlaceholder: Start with "You will..." — the concrete outcome.
BlockEditForm.promiseHelp: Appears in italic on the cards on hover and in the detail hero.
BlockEditForm.descriptionPlaceholder: Long text for the block detail hero. Optional.
BlockEditForm.publishedHelp: If turned off, it is not shown on the public landing (admin still sees it anyway).

CacheClear.heading: Clear DAP cache
CacheClear.subheading: Clear the local cache and start fresh.
CacheClear.doneMessage: Done. Cache cleared. Close this tab and open the site again.

PushTestForm.noSubscriptions: The student has no active subscriptions. Have them enable notifications first from /configuracion.
